macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: FTSE 100 Suffers Sharpest Weekly Decline in 11 Months
items.summary: The FTSE 100 closed 129 points lower at 10,284, down 1.24% on the day and 5.75% for the week amid escalating Middle East tensions. This marks the index's worst weekly performance since April 2025 following Trump's tariffs.

items.title: Deutsche Bank Warns of £2,500 UK Energy Price Cap in July
items.summary: Analysts at Deutsche Bank predict a prolonged surge in energy prices, with oil around $100 per barrel, could push UK household energy costs sharply higher to a £2,500 price cap by July.

items.title: Trump Claims 'Economy is Roaring' Amid Job Losses and Stock Plunge
items.summary: Despite President Trump's assertion that the economy is roaring, the job market has evaporated, gas prices are soaring potentially boosting inflation, and stock markets have plunged.

items.title: UK Bank Shares Tumble as FTSE 100 Falls 2.75%
items.summary: The FTSE 100 dropped 2.75% to below 10,500, narrowly avoiding a 300-point slide, with UK bank shares tumbling amid broader market pressures.

items.title: Asian Markets Plunge with South Korea's KOSPI Down Over 12%
items.summary: Asian markets saw sharp declines overnight, led by South Korea's KOSPI which slumped more than 12% after already losing over 7%, as investor panic spread globally.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Recovers from $66,000 Drop After ETF Sell-Offs
items.summary: Bitcoin fell to $66,000 due to exchange-traded fund sell-offs but is recovering towards $70,000, currently at $67,308 as of March 8. Experts predict short-term volatility from geopolitical tensions but expect long-term adoption to drive recovery amid global crises.

items.title: Bitcoin Weekly Chart Shows Failed Bear Setup and Bull Breakout Trap
items.summary: Bitcoin's weekly chart failed an 'inside-inside' short setup, leading traders to go bullish, but daily charts indicate a failed bull breakout with bears now in control aiming for a second leg down. The market is in a trading range after a tight bear channel, testing support levels.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Three AI Stocks to Watch: BigBear.ai, SoundHound AI, and Hut 8
items.summary: MarketBeat's stock screener identified BigBear.ai (BBAI), SoundHound AI (SOUN), and Hut 8 (HUT) as top AI stocks to follow based on recent trading volume. These companies operate in decision intelligence, conversational AI platforms, and AI infrastructure respectively.

items.title: AI in Defense Sector Accelerates with Autonomous Systems and Cybersecurity Focus
items.summary: Analysis of emerging AI trends reveals growing adoption of AI-powered autonomous weapons, facial recognition systems, and cybersecurity solutions in the defense sector, with machine learning algorithms enabling continuous system improvement.

items.title: Robotics Market Projected to Reach $370 Billion by 2040 Driven by AI Integration
items.summary: The AI robotics market was valued at $13.78 billion in 2025 and is expected to grow at 27.14% CAGR through 2031. AI integration is enabling smarter autonomous machines with applications expanding into autonomous vehicles and retail solutions.

items.title: AI-Powered Testing Tools Transform Software Development Practices
items.summary: AI is revolutionizing software development through automated testing, regression prediction, and test case generation. However, only 50% of developers feel confident in current AI capabilities despite 70% viewing it as a priority.

items.title: Decision Intelligence Platforms Emerge as New AI Category in Enterprise Software
items.summary: Gartner's inaugural Magic Quadrant for Decision Intelligence Platforms (DIPs) marks a shift from data-driven to decision-centric AI models. These platforms integrate AI, machine learning, and analytics to automate business decisions and optimize resource allocation.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: World of Warcraft: Midnight Releases, Impacting Fantasy Critic League Standings
items.summary: World of Warcraft: Midnight has officially released, scoring points for Hidalgo Trading Company in the TAGN Fantasy Critic League 2026 Week Ten. The release was announced late, shifting league positions amid ongoing competition.

items.title: Planet of Lana II – Children of the Leaf Launches
items.summary: Planet of Lana II – Children of the Leaf has released, picked by Green River Gaming in the TAGN Fantasy Critic League, contributing to weekly score updates. This sequel marks a notable game launch in the past day.

items.title: Marathon Game Releases to League Acclaim
items.summary: Marathon has launched, earning scores for Hidalgo Trading Company in the TAGN Fantasy Critic League 2026. The release aligns with Thursday launches that shook up the Week Ten standings.

items.title: Pokémon Pokopia Hits Shelves
items.summary: Pokémon Pokopia has released, boosting Anthania Interactive's position in the TAGN Fantasy Critic League Week Ten. It was one of three major Thursday launches declared late in the week.

items.title: TAGN Fantasy Critic League Sees Bids on Upcoming Titles
items.summary: Bids in the TAGN League secured Silent Hill: Townfall ($22 by S Class Warfare Studios), Outbound ($4 by Pretty Blue Fox Games), and Kena: Scars of Kosmora ($16 by Anthania Interactive). These moves highlight anticipation for future releases.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
